title: Re-Theme'ing a GBP Category
content_md:
# Re-Theme'ing a GBP Category

- Code: 2bd7a999
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=2bd7a9995606430eaa63c344c3edd9c4
- Video: https://vimeo.com/1040463320?share=copy
- Duration: 3m 42s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: So I want to talk about what happens if your target keyword is not an exact fit to a GBP category
For most local businesses, it's going to be a pretty good fit, right?
If you're a plumber, you're going to try to rank for a plumber Houston
That's obviously a GBP category. If you're a roofer, you're going to try to rank for a roofer Houston
Also a GBP category. So for a lot of these home services, ignore this section
This is only if you're trying to rank for a keyword that is not a GBP category
In this case, what we're going to do is something that we call
Re-theming the GBP category and I've created this incredible PowerPoint slide to try to explain what I'm talking about
So the example I'm going to use
We're trying to rank for the keyword car accident lawyer Houston. Obviously a big money keyword
But there's no Google business category
There's no Google business profile category for car accident lawyer. The closest one we have is civil law attorney
So that's the one we're going to choose as a secondary or potentially even primary category is civil law attorney
Usually the primary category in this case is going to be a personal injury attorney. That is a GBP category
So this is a secondary category. So what we're going to do is create a
URL on the existing domain where the URL is an exact match to the secondary category a very common technique that we do for
All of our GBP secondary categories is have URLs that are an exact match to that category
So in this case domain
Slash civil law attorney. Okay. Now the title tag
We're going to use the target keyword, which is not a surprise
We always use the target keywords as the title tag again usually for local services
The target keyword is the GBP category in this case
It's not so we're going to use the target keyword as the title tag car accident lawyer Houston
Of course, the title tag is not just going to be car accident lawyer Houston
We have AI prompts that will help you write better ones. Remember use numbers use brackets use parentheses
All of these to improve the click-through rate, but car accident lawyer Houston
We want to have as an exact match target keyword in the title tag now the h1 tag
This is one of the only times you will ever hear me recommend this almost all the time
The h1 tag should have the same target keyword as the title tag
But when we're retheming a GBP category
We need to make sure Google understands that we understand that we chose a GBP category for this page
So in this case the h1 is going to be civil law attorney Houston an exact match to the secondary category
Okay, then we'll go on with the article as normal. We'll have some h2s about car accidents with phrases
We can have some h3s with some bulleted list of keyword qualifiers and modifiers all related to the target
Of car accident lawyer Houston. Okay, we're not going to talk too much about civil law attorney anymore
It's just going to be the URL and the h1. So in this way
We can make sure that Google knows
Right that our website is consistent with our Google business profile because we've chosen civil law attorney as a secondary category
We have a URL about civil law attorney on our website. That's very important
In addition, we've told Google that we don't actually want to rank for civil law attorney
We want to rank for car accident lawyer now car accident lawyer is closely related to civil law attorney
So this will allow us to rank locally because we've shown Google that we're consistent with the GBP categories
But we will be able to rank locally for car accident lawyer
So this is how you re-theme a GBP category if there isn't one that is an exact match to what you're trying to rank for

summary: This lesson explains how to rank for a keyword that doesn't match an exact Google Business Profile (GBP) category by retheming the GBP category. The example uses 'car accident lawyer' as the target keyword, which is not a direct GBP category, and instead uses 'civil law attorney' as a secondary category.
key_points: Use the target keyword in the title tag
Create an exact match URL for the secondary category
Set the h1 to reflect the secondary category while indicating it’s a retheme
Ensure consistency between the website and Google Business Profile
